input.background: Twenty hedgehogs were sampled from a population in autumn (before hibernation) and weighed. In the spring, the population was again sampled and twenty hedgehogs were captured and weighed. The following data (in kilograms) were obtained.
input.question: Plot the means and standard error bars of hedgehog mass in the autumn and spring collections on a bar or point chart.

output.method: 离散型-连续型变量关系
output.answer: Mass of hedgehogs caught in autumn and spring. Bars are standard errors (n=20 for each).

meta_info.book: Using Statistics to Understand the Environment
